components.name: Vehicle
components.description: Longitudinal vehicle body: mass, aerodynamics (drag coefficient × frontal area) and road grade. Binds to all Wheel elements automatically — no canvas wiring needed for the body itself. Pair it with a Driver element to follow a speed profile.

components.name: Driver
components.description: Speed-following driver (PI controller). Wire a target-speed profile into Target Speed and the Vehicle's speed into Actual Speed; the driver outputs a traction command in [-1, 1] and a friction-brake command, blending recuperation (motor generator quadrant, battery charge limit) before the brakes per the Recuperation Weight.

components.name: HV Battery Pack
components.description: Equivalent-circuit battery pack: OCV(SOC) lookup table with series resistance R0 and an optional RC pair for voltage transients (RC disabled when either RC parameter is 0). SOC integrates over discharge and recuperation; charging power is limited by the maximum charge power.

components.name: E-Motor
components.description: Electric machine with voltage-dependent full-load torque map, power-loss map (motor + inverter) and drag torque. Motoring and generating (recuperation) quadrants; generator limit mirrors the full-load map scaled by the Q4 scale parameter. Traction command input is a normalized demand in [-1, 1].

components.name: DC-DC Converter
components.description: DC-DC converter with constant conversion efficiency. Unidirectional: draws at Terminal A, supplies at Terminal B. When Terminal B feeds a bus with a battery, the converter runs at its power setpoint (parameter or signal) and the battery balances the rest — the fuel-cell hybrid pattern.

components.name: Voltage Source
components.description: Ideal DC voltage source. Supplies unlimited power at a fixed voltage.

components.name: Electric Node
components.description: Ideal electrical junction / bus bar. All connected terminals share one voltage; power balances across the branches.

components.name: Power Consumer
components.description: Constant electrical load (auxiliaries, HVAC, LV net). Draws a fixed power, optionally overridden by a signal input.

components.name: Ground
components.description: Electrical ground / return rail reference. Carries no power in the solve; connect the low side of electrical components here.

components.name: Shaft
components.description: Rigid shaft. Passes torque/speed through with optional mechanical efficiency and rotational inertia.

components.name: Final Drive
components.description: Single-ratio reduction gear. Output torque = input torque × ratio × efficiency (direction-aware); output speed = input speed / ratio.

components.name: Differential
components.description: Splits one mechanical input to two outputs. Unlocked (open): equal torque to both sides, output speeds free (input speed = mean of outputs). Locked: both outputs forced to the same speed, torque split follows the grip on each side.

components.name: Mechanical Node
components.description: Rigid mechanical junction. All connected flanges rotate at the same speed; torques sum. Use one per wheel corner to attach brake and wheel to the same axle end.

components.name: Wheel
components.description: Wheel with longitudinal slip tire model: traction force = slip stiffness × slip × normal load, saturated at μ × normal load. Normal load comes from the Vehicle mass × this wheel's load share. Rolling resistance acts on the vehicle body.

components.name: Brake
components.description: Friction brake. Applies braking torque = command × maximum torque, opposing rotation (no torque reversal at standstill).

components.name: Propeller
components.description: Quadratic mechanical load: torque = reference torque × (speed / reference speed)². Placeholder for aircraft/marine loads until a full aircraft body model exists.

components.name: Driving Task
components.description: Time-based target-speed profile (piecewise-linear). Points are given as 't:speed' pairs separated by ';'. Wire the output to the Vehicle's Target Speed input.

components.name: Constant
components.description: Constant signal source.

components.name: Script (Function)
components.description: User-written Python function evaluated every step. Add named signal input/output ports in the Properties panel; the step() function receives inputs and a persistent state dict and returns a dict of output values. Use for hybrid control strategies, custom recuperation logic, signal math, etc.

parameters.label: Python Code

components.name: Monitor
components.description: Display-only monitor. Add signal input ports and wire any signals into them; during and after a run the Monitors panel shows live readouts and sparklines for every wired input.

components.name: Ambient
components.description: Ambient environment boundary condition (no thermal solver yet).

components.name: System
components.description: Sub-system container. Double-click to drill into its child topology. Organizational — physical connections do not cross the boundary; use the Data Bus for signals.

components.name: Combustion Engine
components.description: Internal combustion engine: full-load torque curve, drag (motoring) torque, and a fuel-consumption map (speed × torque → kg/h). Built-in idle governor holds idle speed when enabled. Enable input allows hybrid start/stop control (unwired = always on); consumes from the Fuel Tank automatically.

components.name: Fuel Tank
components.description: Fuel reservoir. Combustion engines draw from it automatically; when it runs dry the engine shuts off. One tank per model.

components.name: Gearbox
components.description: Multi-speed gearbox. The ratio table maps gear number → ratio; the Gear Select signal picks the active gear (nearest defined gear wins, unwired = default gear). Shifts apply at recording-step boundaries.

components.name: Clutch
components.description: Friction clutch (smooth Coulomb model). Transmits up to engagement × maximum torque across the slipping interface; under load a small residual slip remains even when fully engaged. Unwired engagement = fully closed.

components.name: Transfer Case
components.description: Center torque split for AWD/multi-axle drivelines. Unlocked: torque splits per the split parameter with free output speeds (planetary-style speed weighting); locked: both outputs forced to the same speed. Each output can feed an axle differential.

components.name: Fuel Cell Stack
components.description: PEM fuel cell stack: polarization curve (stack voltage vs. current) with a current limit; hydrogen consumption follows electrical energy. Draws from the Hydrogen Tank automatically. Typically feeds the HV bus through a DC-DC converter running at a power setpoint.

components.name: Hydrogen Tank
components.description: Pressurized hydrogen storage. Fuel cells draw from it automatically; when empty the stack shuts down. One tank per model.

components.name: PID Controller
components.description: Generic PID feedback controller with output clamping and anti-windup, evaluated once per recording step. Use it for custom control loops without writing a script.

components.name: Lookup Table
components.description: Applies a 1D or 2D lookup table to its input signal(s) — no-code signal shaping (e.g. pedal maps, recuperation weighting).

components.name: Road Profile
components.description: Road grade profile over distance (or time), piecewise-linear 'x:grade%' pairs. Wire the grade output to the Vehicle's Road Grade input; in distance mode it follows the Vehicle's distance automatically when unwired.
